steps.assistant_text: Back-ported the B850 family recipe (same fade-toward-target shape, fields 0x124/0x12C, steps 0x360/0x364): direct st+0x124 compares, per-arm if(1){} pointer-mutation materialization of v (colors $v1, no move), per-arm st reload. Old body's named head local v=s+0x124 coalesced into dead $a1 after mtc1 a1,$f12; per-arm webs color $v1 like target. 49/49 words, ROM cmp clean.
